User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application, primarily medical professionals like doctors or hospital staff, who have secure login access to the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

username.description: A unique username for login purposes.

email.description: The user's email address, used for communication or account recovery.

fullName.description: The full name of the user (e.g., Doctor's full name).

role.description: The role of the user within the system (e.g., 'Doctor', 'Admin', 'MedicalStaff').

hospitalName.description: The name of the hospital or clinic where the doctor practices.

specialization.description: The medical specialization of the doctor.

address.description: Optional professional address or clinic location.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Stores demographic and administrative information for a patient.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Patient entity.

patientIdCode.description: A unique alphanumeric code or medical record number for the patient.

name_lower.description: Lowercase version of full name for case-insensitive search.

admissionDate.description: The date and time of the patient's admission.

latestRiskLevel.description: The most recent predicted risk level (Low, Medium, High).

latestIcuRisk.description: The most recent predicted ICU risk score.

latestArrestRisk.description: The most recent predicted Cardiac Arrest risk score.

latestMortalityRisk.description: The most recent predicted Mortality risk score.

preExistingConditions.description: Comma-separated list of pre-existing conditions (e.g., Diabetes, Hypertension).

addedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who added this patient record.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the patient record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the patient record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profiles with detailed professional information.
Stores patient demographics and risk factors.
